title: My Daughter Stole $190K, Forged My Signature, And Left Me Homeless. So I Made Her My Caregiver.
description: I was 57 when I found a foreclosure notice on my fully paid-off home and a forged signature on a reverse mortgage I never signed. My daughter had drained $190,000 in equity and bought herself a condo six states away. Using forensic accounting skills, I proved identity theft, recovered the deed plus $220,000 in damages, and now she’s my live-in caregiver by court order, paying back every cent at the same bank that funded her fraud. #Betrayal #Revenge #JusticeServed
thumb_text: SHE STOLE MY HOME, NOW SHE SERVES ME BREAKFAST
pinned_comment: If your daughter forged your signature and drained $190K from your paid-off home, leaving you with a foreclosure notice, what would you have done? Share your story in the comments.

thumb_lines.text: FORECLOSURE NOTICE CAME, SHE BOUGHT A CONDO SIX STATES AWAY
MY CAREGIVER SERVING ME BREAKFAST AT 8
